title: rubiaceae
intro: The Rubiaceae rank is a taxonomic family of flowering plants, commonly known as the madder or coffee family. This family comprises approximately 13,000 species of plants, many of which are shrubs, small trees, or climbing vines. The Rubiaceae family includes a diverse range of plants, including coffee, gardenias, and the fragrant flowers of the genus Gardenia. Many species within this family have medicinal properties, and some are used as ornamental plants in gardens and landscapes.
